---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's the user problem or limitation? Which stage / config / integration does it affect?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? Sketch the API or CLI surface if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why this one is preferred.

## Scope

- [ ] Affects a contract (`src/evalit_4me/contracts.py`) — breaking
- [ ] Affects a venue config schema
- [ ] New venue config only (e.g. ICSE, CHI)
- [ ] New LLM provider
- [ ] Tooling / DX only (no runtime change)

## Additional context

Links to papers, prior art, related issues, or example inputs.
